title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. Click Reset Password and follow the instructions sent to your email.

title: Account Creation
content: Users can create a new account by clicking the Sign Up button on the homepage and entering their email and password.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can delete their account from Settings > Privacy > Delete Account.

title: Subscription Cancellation
content: Subscriptions can be cancelled from the Billing section in account settings.

title: Payment Methods
content: The platform supports credit card, debit card and UPI payments.
